parameters.query:
SELECT
  id AS user_id,
  email,
  full_name
FROM users
WHERE is_active = 1;

SELECT
  p.user_id,
  p.skills
FROM profiles p
WHERE p.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }};

SELECT
  {{ $json.user_id }} AS user_id,
  j.id AS job_id,

  /* matched_skills */
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM JSON_TABLE(
      CASE
        WHEN JSON_VALID(j.skills_required) THEN CAST(j.skills_required AS JSON)
        ELSE JSON_ARRAY()
      END,
      '$[*]' COLUMNS (skill VARCHAR(64) PATH '$')
    ) req
    WHERE req.skill IN (
      SELECT us.skill
      FROM profiles p
      JOIN JSON_TABLE(
        CASE
          WHEN JSON_VALID(p.skills) THEN CAST(p.skills AS JSON)
          ELSE JSON_ARRAY()
        END,
        '$[*]' COLUMNS (skill VARCHAR(64) PATH '$')
      ) us
      WHERE p.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
    )
  ) AS score,

  /* explanation: Matched X/Y */
  CONCAT(
    'Matched ',
    (
      SELECT COUNT(*)
      FROM JSON_TABLE(
        CASE
          WHEN JSON_VALID(j.skills_required) THEN CAST(j.skills_required AS JSON)
          ELSE JSON_ARRAY()
        END,
        '$[*]' COLUMNS (skill VARCHAR(64) PATH '$')
      ) req2
      WHERE req2.skill IN (
        SELECT us2.skill
        FROM profiles p2
        JOIN JSON_TABLE(
          CASE
            WHEN JSON_VALID(p2.skills) THEN CAST(p2.skills AS JSON)
            ELSE JSON_ARRAY()
          END,
          '$[*]' COLUMNS (skill VARCHAR(64) PATH '$')
        ) us2
        WHERE p2.user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
      )
    ),
    '/',
    JSON_LENGTH(
      CASE
        WHEN JSON_VALID(j.skills_required) THEN CAST(j.skills_required AS JSON)
        ELSE JSON_ARRAY()
      END
    ),
    ' skills'
  ) AS explanation

FROM jobs j
/* filtro opcional por recencia */
WHERE j.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 90 DAY
ORDER BY score DESC, j.posted_at DESC, j.id DESC
LIMIT 5;

INSERT INTO job_matches (user_id, job_id, score, explanation, run_date, created_at)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.user_id }},
  {{ $json.job_id }},
  {{ $json.score }},
  '{{ $json.explanation.replaceAll("'", "''") }}',
  CURDATE(),
  NOW()
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  score = VALUES(score),
  explanation = VALUES(explanation),
  created_at = VALUES(created_at);

INSERT INTO ranking_daily (user_id, run_date, top_jobs_json, created_at, updated_at)
SELECT
  jm.user_id,
  CURDATE(),
  (
    SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(
      JSON_OBJECT('job_id', t.job_id, 'score', t.score, 'explanation', t.explanation)
    )
    FROM (
      SELECT jm2.job_id, jm2.score, jm2.explanation
      FROM job_matches jm2
      WHERE jm2.user_id = jm.user_id
        AND jm2.run_date = CURDATE()
      ORDER BY jm2.score DESC, jm2.job_id DESC
      LIMIT 5
    ) t
  ),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM job_matches jm
WHERE jm.id = LAST_INSERT_ID()
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  top_jobs_json = VALUES(top_jobs_json),
  updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)

SELECT
  rd.user_id,
  rd.run_date,
  jt.job_id,
  j.title,
  j.company,
  j.city,
  jt.score,
  jt.explanation
FROM (
  SELECT *
  FROM ranking_daily
  WHERE run_date = CURDATE()
  ORDER BY updated_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
) rd
JOIN JSON_TABLE(
  rd.top_jobs_json,
  '$[*]' COLUMNS (
    job_id INT PATH '$.job_id',
    score DECIMAL(6,2) PATH '$.score',
    explanation VARCHAR(255) PATH '$.explanation'
  )
) jt
JOIN jobs j ON j.id = jt.job_id
ORDER BY jt.score DESC, jt.job_id DESC
